weight_transform: torch router gate weight [num_experts, hidden_dim] must be laid out for ttnn linear (transpose to [hidden_dim, num_experts] and tilize); bias preallocated once as a persistent fused-op buffer (_init_fused_op) rather than per-call
applicability_notes: constraints: ['input activations must be bfloat16 (caller typecasts and deallocates the temporary afterwards)', 'fused-op buffers (bias) must be initialized once before first call, keyed on device and batch size B']
pattern_source: call-site comment: 'Run fused matmul + topk + softmax' (no registered golden; pattern reconstructed only from in-repo call-site annotation)
